meta.title: Mauro Henrique - Product Owner (PO) | UX + Front-end
meta.description: Product Owner focused on UX and data, with a background in front-end and digital strategy. I prioritize the backlog, structure decisions, and deliver measurable impact by connecting user experience, business, and technology.
meta.keywords: product owner, PO, UX, UI, front-end, digital strategy, discovery, prioritization, metrics, product
meta.ogTitle: Mauro Henrique - Product Owner (PO) | UX + Front-end
meta.ogDescription: Product Owner focused on UX and data, with a background in front-end and digital strategy. I prioritize the backlog, structure decisions, and deliver measurable impact.

meta.pageTitleHome: Product Owner | Case studies and process

banner.tagline: Product Owner who connects business, UX, and technology to evolve complex digital products
banner.highlight2: Hands-on PO experience in a corporate environment
banner.highlight3: Experience with integrations, CMS, and platforms

processo.title: Decision process
processo.intro: I structure decisions to reduce risk, align stakeholders, and make delivery predictable.

etapas.texto: Product goals, stakeholders, constraints, and what must be true for the initiative to move forward.
Research, analytics, and feedback to understand the real problem—not just the surface perception.
I define what to test, how to measure success, and which signals indicate learning or the need to pivot.
I organize the backlog considering impact, effort, dependencies, and the team’s real capacity.
I follow up post-release, validate outcomes, and turn evidence into decisions for the next iteration.

impacto.title: Impact delivered
impacto.intro: I assess impact by outcome (metric + evidence) and by learning (what changes in the product after shipping).

cards.texto: I reduce guesswork with clear hypotheses, success criteria, and metric tracking.
Prioritization and alignment rituals that increase cadence and reduce rework.
Post-delivery learning: scope adjustments, friction fixes, and evolving value for users.

diferencial.title: Hybrid edge
diferencial.intro: My background blends PO/UX with front-end. As a Tech Lead, much of my day-to-day was close to a PO’s: organizing and prioritizing the backlog, running ceremonies, and aligning delivery with the team’s methodologies (Scrum and complementary practices). That speeds decisions, reduces rework, and improves what ships to production.
bullets: I turn UX into objective requirements (with success criteria).
Technical anticipation to avoid bottlenecks before the team invests time.
I close the loop: validation → decision → execution → metric.
Tech Lead with a strong PO bias: negotiated backlog, Scrum, and rituals used to give the team predictability.

sobre.title: About (in practice)
sobre.p1: I’m a Product Owner focused on UX and digital strategy, with experience in front-end and technical leadership.
sobre.p2: As a Tech Lead, I led many typical PO activities with the development team: structuring and prioritizing the backlog, sprint planning, and Scrum-aligned ceremonies (and other agile practices when they made sense), plus aligning stakeholders with delivery capacity.
sobre.p3: My work connects evidence-led discovery, prioritization with trade-offs, and post-delivery impact tracking.
sobre.p4: I look for opportunities where product decisions accelerate growth, reduce friction, and improve the user experience.

marcos.texto: I structure questions and hypotheses to guide what we build.
A backlog aligned to impact, capacity, and dependencies.
Track outcomes and learning so you can iterate with confidence.

contato.title: Let’s talk?
contato.intro: If you’re looking for a PO who structures decisions with evidence, turns UX into requirements, and follows impact, let’s connect.

aboutPage.title: About (in practice)
aboutPage.subtitle: Product Owner focused on UX and data, with a background in front-end and digital strategy. I turn needs into intentional decisions, reduce rework, and track post-delivery impact.
aboutPage.callout: My goal is to help teams build what matters: clarity, negotiated priorities, and continuous learning.

marcos.texto: I structure hypotheses and ask the right questions to guide what we build.
A backlog aligned to impact, capacity, and team dependencies.
I track outcomes and learning so we can iterate with confidence.
